---
title: "Lista 3 - Workflow"
author: "Victor Bessa"
date: "2026-03-25"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Definir as pastas que serão criadas

```{r}

pastas <- c("data/raw", "data/processed", "scripts", "outputs", "paper")

```

# Criar as pastas 

```{r}
lapply(pastas, dir.create, recursive = TRUE)
```

# Criar os arquivos R vazios dentro da pasta scripts

```{r}
file.create("scripts/01_clean.R", "scripts/02_analysis.R")

```
